news.t: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
Pacer ETFs Celebrates Banner Year of Growth in 2022, Crosses $20B to Kickoff New Year
Pacer ETFs Celebrates 7th Birthday, Year of Rapid Growth Amid Market Challenges
Pacer ETFs' New Funds Pinpoint Opportunities in Supply Chain and Data Industries

holdings.infoBox: SHPP is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings. The top holdings are SAP SE stock at 9.93%, ABB Ltd at 9.35%, Union Pacific at 8.40%, CSX Corporation at 4.57%, and Canadian Pacific Kansas City at 4.22%.

overview.description: The Pacer Industrials and Logistics ETF (SHPP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of global companies engaged in transportation, logistics software and hardware, as well as the ancillary services that support the global distribution supply chains. SHPP was launched on Jun 8, 2022 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Pacer Global Supply Chain Infrastructure Index
